params_used.custom_text: // This module selects data from two 64-bit input sources based on a 2-bit selection signal. When sel is 00, the output will be the upper 32 bits of in0; when sel is 01, the output will be the lower 32 bits of in0; when sel is 10, the output will be the upper 32 bits of in1; and when sel is 11, the output will be the lower 32 bits of in1.
